---
title: "Játékosértékelés"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(jsonlite)
library(scales)
library(yaml)

# --- Manuális értékelések ---
ratings <- read.csv("player_ratings.csv", encoding = "UTF-8", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, sep = ";")

# --- Profil URL térkép: játékos neve → jatekosok/*.html ---
build_profile_map <- function() {
  files <- list.files("jatekosok", pattern = "\\.qmd$", full.names = TRUE)
  files <- files[!grepl("^_", basename(files))]
  result <- list()
  for (f in files) {
    lines  <- readLines(f, encoding = "UTF-8", warn = FALSE)
    delims <- which(lines == "---")
    if (length(delims) < 2) next
    meta <- tryCatch(
      yaml::yaml.load(paste(lines[(delims[1]+1):(delims[2]-1)], collapse = "\n")),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(meta$profile$nev)) next
    url <- sub("\\.qmd$", ".html", paste0("jatekosok/", basename(f)))
    result[[meta$profile$nev]] <- url
  }
  result
}
profile_map <- build_profile_map()

# --- DB adatok ---
con <- dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), "bball_10_tables.db")

player_info <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT DISTINCT Játékos, Poszt, Státusz,
         CAST(\"Szül. év.\" AS INTEGER) AS Szul_ev
  FROM player_info
")

player_stats <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT s.Játékos, s.Szezon, s.Csapat,
         s.Min         AS Min_tot,
         s.[Min PG]    AS Min_PG,
         s.[PTS PG]    AS PTS_PG,
         s.[TS%]       AS TS_pct,
         s.[EFG%]      AS eFG_pct,
         a.[USG%]      AS USG_pct
  FROM player_scoring_stats s
  JOIN player_advanced_stats a USING(Játékos, Szezon, Csapat)
")

dbDisconnect(con)

# --- Összekötés ---
info_dedup <- player_info %>%
  group_by(Játékos) %>%
  slice(1) %>%
  ungroup()

table_data <- ratings %>%
  left_join(info_dedup, by = "Játékos") %>%
  mutate(
    Besorolás = factor(Besorolás,
      levels = c("Strong Buy", "Buy", "Hold", "Sell", "Strong Sell"))
  ) %>%
  arrange(Besorolás, Játékos) %>%
  select(Játékos, `Szül. év` = Szul_ev, Poszt, Státusz, Besorolás)

# --- Stat összefoglaló profilhoz ---
profile_stats <- player_stats %>%
  filter(Játékos %in% ratings$Játékos) %>%
  arrange(Játékos, Szezon)

rating_notes <- ratings %>%
  select(Játékos, Megjegyzés)

# --- Besorolás badge színek ---
badge_color <- function(r) {
  switch(as.character(r),
    "Strong Buy"  = "#1a7a4a",
    "Buy"         = "#4caf50",
    "Hold"        = "#D4902A",
    "Sell"        = "#e57373",
    "Strong Sell" = "#C43A28",
    "#7A756D"
  )
}

# --- Child row HTML felépítése ---
make_child <- function(jatekos) {
  stats <- profile_stats %>% filter(Játékos == jatekos)
  note  <- rating_notes %>% filter(Játékos == jatekos) %>% pull(Megjegyzés)
  note  <- if (length(note) == 0 || is.na(note) || note == "") NULL else note

  if (nrow(stats) == 0) {
    return(paste0('<div style="padding:12px 24px;color:#7A756D;font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;">',
                  'Nincs adat a DB-ben ehhez a játékoshoz.</div>'))
  }

  c_td <- 'style="text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;"'
  l_td <- 'style="text-align:left;padding:4px 8px;"'
  rows <- apply(stats, 1, function(r) {
    paste0(
      '<tr>',
      '<td ', l_td, '>', r["Szezon"], '</td>',
      '<td ', l_td, '>', r["Csapat"], '</td>',
      '<td ', c_td, '>', as.integer(r["Min_tot"]), '</td>',
      '<td ', c_td, '>', round(as.numeric(r["Min_PG"]), 1), '</td>',
      '<td ', c_td, '>', round(as.numeric(r["PTS_PG"]), 1), '</td>',
      '<td ', c_td, '>', scales::percent(as.numeric(r["TS_pct"]),  accuracy = 0.1), '</td>',
      '<td ', c_td, '>', scales::percent(as.numeric(r["eFG_pct"]), accuracy = 0.1), '</td>',
      '<td ', c_td, '>', round(as.numeric(r["USG_pct"]), 1), '%</td>',
      '</tr>'
    )
  })

  note_html <- if (!is.null(note)) {
    paste0('<p style="margin:12px 0 4px;color:#2E2B26;font-style:italic;">', note, '</p>')
  } else ""

  paste0(
    '<div style="padding:12px 24px;font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;background:#F6F4F0;">',
    note_html,
    '<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:13px;">',
    '<thead><tr style="color:#7A756D;border-bottom:1px solid #D4CFC6;">',
    '<th style="text-align:left;padding:4px 8px;">Szezon</th>',
    '<th style="text-align:left;padding:4px 8px;">Csapat</th>',
    '<th style="text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;">Min</th>',
    '<th style="text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;">Min/M</th>',
    '<th style="text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;">PTS/M</th>',
    '<th style="text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;">TS%</th>',
    '<th style="text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;">eFG%</th>',
    '<th style="text-align:center;padding:4px 8px;">USG%</th>',
    '</tr></thead>',
    '<tbody>', paste(rows, collapse = ""), '</tbody>',
    '</table></div>'
  )
}

child_rows <- sapply(table_data$Játékos, make_child)

# --- Badge HTML + profil link ---
table_display <- table_data %>%
  mutate(
    Játékos = mapply(function(nev) {
      url <- profile_map[[nev]]
      if (!is.null(url)) {
        paste0('<a href="', url, '" style="color:var(--accent-dark);font-weight:600;',
               'text-decoration:none;" onmouseover="this.style.textDecoration=\'underline\'"',
               ' onmouseout="this.style.textDecoration=\'none\'">',  nev, '</a>')
      } else {
        nev
      }
    }, Játékos),
    Besorolás = mapply(function(r) {
      if (is.na(r) || r == "NA") return('<span style="color:#B0A89E;font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;">—</span>')
      col <- badge_color(r)
      paste0('<span style="background:', col,
             ';color:#fff;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:12px;',
             'font-size:12px;font-weight:600;font-family:Montserrat,sans-serif;">',
             r, '</span>')
    }, as.character(Besorolás))
  )
```

```{r tabla}
child_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(child_rows, auto_unbox = TRUE)

DT::datatable(
  table_display,
  rownames  = FALSE,
  escape    = FALSE,
  selection = "none",
  callback  = DT::JS(paste0("
    var childData = ", child_json, ";
    table.on('click', 'tr', function(e) {
      if ($(e.target).closest('a').length > 0) return;
      var row = table.row(this);
      var idx = row.index();
      if (typeof idx === 'undefined') return;
      if (row.child.isShown()) {
        row.child.hide();
        $(this).removeClass('shown');
      } else {
        row.child(childData[idx]).show();
        $(this).addClass('shown');
      }
    });
  ")),
  options = list(
    dom        = "ft",
    pageLength = 100,
    ordering   = TRUE,
    language   = list(search = "Keresés:"),
    columnDefs = list(
      list(className = "dt-center", targets = c(1, 2, 3, 4)),
      list(orderable = FALSE, targets = 4)
    )
  )
)
```
